# Implementation Plan: Python Kanban Tool

*Provenance: Generated by plan agent (`ses_131b90034ffeNJC8dk93U3oV6K`) from hyperplan-structured insight bundle (5 adversarial members: minimalist, creative-designer, thorough-planner, deep-logician, researcher).*

---

## Architecture Decisions (Fixed — Do Not Change)

- **FastAPI** for web (not Flask, not stdlib http.server)
- **Two processes**: web server + MCP stdio server, sharing SQLite with WAL mode
- **Integer gap positioning** (1000, 2000, 3000...) not fractional indexing
- **Individual per-operation MCP tools**, not action-dispatch
- **Sub-tasks as separate table** (card_id, name, is_completed, position)
- **Notes as description text field** on cards table
- **HTMX + SortableJS** (hybrid) for frontend
- **No auth, no Docker, no ORM** (raw sqlite3 + Pydantic)
- **Always-fresh SQLite reads** (no caching layer)

---

## File-by-File Build Sequence

### T1: pyproject.toml (~10 lines)

```toml
[project]
name = "kanban"
version = "0.1.0"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.110.0",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.27.0",
    "pydantic>=2.0.0",
]
```

**That's it.** Three runtime dependencies. No async SQL driver needed — `sqlite3` is stdlib and non-blocking at the filesystem level. No `jinja2` declared explicitly (FastAPI bundles it for template support). No `mcp` SDK — we hand-roll the protocol over stdin/stdout.

### T2: models.py (~80 lines)

Pydantic models (no DB dependency — testable in isolation):

| Class | Type | Fields |
|---|---|---|
| `Subtask` | Response | id: int, card_id: int, name: str, is_completed: bool, position: int |
| `Card` | Response | id: int, list_id: int, title: str, description: str, position: int, created_at: str, subtasks: list[Subtask] |
| `List` | Response | id: int, board_id: int, name: str, position: int, cards: list[Card] |
| `Board` | Response | id: int, name: str, created_at: str, lists: list[List] |
| `CreateBoard` | Request | name: str |
| `CreateList` | Request | board_id: int, name: str |
| `CreateCard` | Request | list_id: int, title: str, description: str = "" |
| `UpdateCard` | Request | title: str \| None = None, description: str \| None = None |
| `MoveCard` | Request | list_id: int, position: int |
| `CreateSubtask` | Request | name: str |
| `ToggleSubtask` | Request | is_completed: bool |

No dependencies beyond pydantic. Can be fully TDD'd first.

### T3: db.py (~200 lines)

**Contains**: 1 constant, 2 helpers, 13 query functions, 1 utility

| Function | Signature | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `DB_PATH` | constant | `os.path.join(__file__, "kanban.db")` |
| `get_conn()` | `() -> sqlite3.Connection` | New WAL-mode connection, `row_factory=sqlite3.Row`, `foreign_keys=ON` |
| `init_db()` | `() -> None` | CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for boards, lists, cards, subtasks |
| `get_boards()` | `() -> list[Board]` | Full nested fetch: boards → lists → cards → subtasks |
| `create_board(name)` | `(str) -> Board` | INSERT + fetch |
| `delete_board(id)` | `(int) -> None` | DELETE WHERE id (CASCADE) |
| `create_list(board_id, name)` | `(int, str) -> List` | Auto-position at next gap |
| `update_list(id, name)` | `(int, str) -> List \| None` | UPDATE name |
| `delete_list(id)` | `(int) -> None` | DELETE + rebalance |
| `create_card(list_id, title, desc)` | `(int, str, str) -> Card` | Auto-position at next gap |
| `update_card(id, title, desc)` | `(int, str\|None, str\|None) -> Card \| None` | Partial update |
| `delete_card(id)` | `(int) -> None` | DELETE + rebalance |
| `move_card(id, list_id, pos)` | `(int, int, int) -> None` | UPDATE list_id + position |
| `create_subtask(card_id, name)` | `(int, str) -> Subtask` | Auto-position at next gap |
| `toggle_subtask(id)` | `(int) -> Subtask \| None` | Flip is_completed bit |
| `delete_subtask(id)` | `(int) -> None` | DELETE + rebalance |
| `_rebalance(table, col, parent_id)` | `(str, str, int) -> None` | Renumber positions: 1000, 2000, 3000... |

Key design: `get_boards()` does 4 sequential queries (not 4 JOINs) — simpler, no Cartesian products. Nested dict → Pydantic in Python.

### T4: mcp_server.py (~150 lines)

**13 MCP tools** (stdio transport, newline-delimited JSON):

| Tool | Input Schema |
|---|---|
| `kanban_get_boards` | {} |
| `kanban_create_board` | {name: str} |
| `kanban_delete_board` | {board_id: int} |
| `kanban_create_list` | {board_id: int, name: str} |
| `kanban_update_list` | {list_id: int, name: str} |
| `kanban_delete_list` | {list_id: int} |
| `kanban_create_card` | {list_id: int, title: str, description?: str} |
| `kanban_update_card` | {card_id: int, title?: str, description?: str} |
| `kanban_delete_card` | {card_id: int} |
| `kanban_move_card` | {card_id: int, list_id: int, position: int} |
| `kanban_create_subtask` | {card_id: int, name: str} |
| `kanban_toggle_subtask` | {subtask_id: int} |
| `kanban_delete_subtask` | {subtask_id: int} |

Protocol: `MCPServer` class with handle_message(msg) → dict, dispatches on method. Stdio: readline → parse → dispatch → write JSON line.

### T5: web.py + templates/index.html

**web.py (~250 lines)** — 14 routes:

| Route | Method | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/` | GET | Full board page (HTML) |
| `/boards` | POST | Create board (HTMX fragment) |
| `/boards/{id}` | DELETE | Delete board (HTMX fragment) |
| `/boards/{id}/lists` | POST | Create list (HTMX fragment) |
| `/lists/{id}` | PATCH | Rename list (HTMX fragment) |
| `/lists/{id}` | DELETE | Delete list (HTMX fragment) |
| `/lists/{id}/cards` | POST | Create card (HTMX fragment) |
| `/cards/{id}` | GET | Card detail modal (HTMX fragment) |
| `/cards/{id}` | PATCH | Update card (HTMX fragment) |
| `/cards/{id}` | DELETE | Delete card (HTMX fragment) |
| `/cards/{id}/move` | PATCH | Move card (HX-Trigger refresh) |
| `/cards/{id}/subtasks` | POST | Add subtask (HTMX fragment) |
| `/subtasks/{id}/toggle` | PATCH | Toggle subtask (HTMX fragment) |
| `/subtasks/{id}` | DELETE | Delete subtask (HTMX fragment) |

**templates/index.html (~120 lines Jinja2)**:
- Single-board view (renders first board, or empty state)
- Card surface shows title + subtask preview + notes preview
- Card editing via modal
- "+ Card" button per list
- Empty state: "Create your first board" when no boards

### T6: static/style.css + static/script.js

**style.css (~80 lines)**: Horizontal scroll board layout, card styling, subtask list, modal overlay, responsive stacking.

**script.js (~40 lines)**: SortableJS initialization for drag-and-drop, htmx re-init on DOM changes.

### T7: kanban.py (~30 lines)

CLI entry point: `python kanban.py web` → starts FastAPI on :8080. `python kanban.py mcp` → starts MCP server on stdio.

### T8: Tests

| File | Tests | Scope |
|---|---|---|
| `tests/conftest.py` | ~30 lines | Temp DB path fixture |
| `tests/test_models.py` | ~40 lines | Pydantic validation |
| `tests/test_db.py` | ~160 lines, ~15 tests | All CRUD + cascade + rebalance + WAL |
| `tests/test_web.py` | ~100 lines, ~8 tests | FastAPI TestClient routes |
| `tests/test_mcp.py` | ~80 lines, ~6 tests | JSON-RPC handshake + tools |

---

## Verification Gates

| Gate | After | Command | Proves |
|---|---|---|---|
| G1 | models.py + test_models.py | `pytest tests/test_models.py -v` | Pydantic models validate |
| G2 | db.py + test_db.py | `pytest tests/test_db.py -v` | All CRUD + cascades + rebalance |
| G3 | web.py + templates | `pytest tests/test_web.py -v` + `python -c "from web import app"` | Routes work, no import errors |
| G4 | mcp_server.py + test_mcp.py | `pytest tests/test_mcp.py -v` | JSON-RPC handshake + tools |
| G5 | static/ assets | `python kanban.py web` → `curl :8080` | Full stack boots |
| G6 | Integration | Two-process share test | MCP + web share SQLite |

---

## Edge Cases

| # | Edge Case | Resolution |
|---|---|---|
| E1 | Position collision | `_rebalance()` after DELETE; auto-position uses `(max + 1000)` |
| E2 | Empty board state | "Create your first board" CTA |
| E3 | Empty list in board | "No cards yet" placeholder |
| E4 | Card with 0 subtasks | Hide subtask section on surface; show in modal |
| E5 | Long card titles | CSS `word-break: break-word`; server-side 255-char truncation |
| E6 | Concurrent MCP + Web write | WAL mode + SQLite serializes writers |
| E7 | MCP stdin EOF | `try/except EOFError` → graceful exit |
| E8 | Board deletion with active view | Return empty state HTML fragment |
| E9 | Subtask toggle race | Idempotent flip — double-flip = no-op |
| E10 | Very long board name | Server-side 200-char truncation + CSS overflow hidden |

---

## Commit Strategy (7 Commits)

| C# | Tag | Files | Gate |
|---|---|---|---|
| C1 | scaffold | pyproject.toml, models.py, tests | G1 |
| C2 | db-layer | db.py, test_db.py | G2 |
| C3 | web-server | web.py, templates/index.html, test_web.py | G3 |
| C4 | mcp-server | mcp_server.py, test_mcp.py | G4 |
| C5 | frontend | style.css, script.js | G5 |
| C6 | cli-entry | kanban.py | G5 full stack |
| C7 | integration | README, opencode config | G6 |

---

## Session Wave Planner

```
Session 1: C1 + C2  (models + DB)
Session 2: C3 + C5  (web server + frontend assets)
Session 3: C4 + C6  (MCP server + CLI entry point)
Session 4: C7       (integration, README, opencode config)
```

---

## MCP Client Configuration

```jsonc
// .opencode/opencode.jsonc or ~/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "kanban": {
      "command": "python",
      "args": ["/path/to/kanban/kanban.py", "mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```
